author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(refinements): escape facet values starting with "-" (#5039)
body:
* feat(refinements): escape facet values starting with "-"

If a facet starts with `-`, the filter will be equivalent to "NOT VALUE" instead of "-VALUE". This is fixed by using the "value" key of each facet instead of the name, via https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/pull/889

This refactored some, but not all of the tests (as all would be too much work) to follow a more realistic code path.

FX-1135

* change to test

* wip

* remove sffv

see https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/pull/900 instead

* update to sffv-including helper

* use safeValue

* update to latest helper

* make tests not be bad anymore

* update helper

* update to latest helper + refactor bad test

* final helper
